user.title: Omoda 9 / Jaecoo
user.description: Enter your Omoda/Jaecoo account email and vehicle PIN. An OTP code will be sent to your email; VIN and account ID are detected automatically.

data.certs_src: Folder with mutual-TLS certs to import (optional)

otp.title: Email verification code
otp.description: Enter the OTP code received by email.

select_vehicle.title: Select vehicle
select_vehicle.description: Your account has more than one vehicle. Choose the VIN to add.

error.otp_send_failed: Could not send the OTP code. Check the email/PIN and try again.
error.no_vehicle: Login succeeded but no vehicle was found on this account.

abort.token_move_failed: Could not store the authentication token. Check Home Assistant's config folder permissions and try again.

init.title: Omoda 9 — automatic updates
init.description: How often to wake the car and refresh telemetry + GPS position. 0 = disabled. The charging interval is used while the car is plugged in (telemetry refreshes more often to follow the charge).

data.poll_charging_min: Update interval while plugged in (minutes, 0 = off)
data.vehicle_name: Vehicle name (leave empty to use the name detected from the car)
